title: Peppery Flaky White Asparagus Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly Mediterranean dish featuring peppery white asparagus and a dash of bhuna spices in a flaky texture, perfect for quick meal prep.
instructions: Wash and peel the white asparagus, cut into small pieces.
Heat a tablespoon of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add garlic and red onion to the pan. Sauté for about 2 minutes until softened.
Add asparagus and Bhuna spices blend to the pan. Stir fry for another minute.
Pour tomato sauce evenly on top, add salt and pepper to taste. Stir well.
Simmer for an additional 5-7 minutes till everything is heated through.
Serve hot with crusty bread or by itself as a snack.
